---
title: "nitrix.geometry.coords"
generated: true
signature-hash: a4e054e65ecfdefa
description: "Coordinate utilities."
listing:
  id: nitrix-geometry-coords-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-geometry-coords/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.geometry.coords`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Coordinate utilities.

Centre of mass on point clouds, displacements from reference points,
and the weight-compactness regulariser.

The shape convention is chosen to sit naturally with the rest of the
library:

- `weight`: `(..., n_regions, n_points)` -- one row per region,
  one column per point.
- `coords`: `(..., n_points, ndim)` -- one row per point.
- [`center_of_mass_points`](nitrix-geometry-coords/center_of_mass_points.qmd) returns `(..., n_regions, ndim)`.

The point-leading `(..., n_points, ndim)` coordinate layout matches
that used elsewhere (`bilateral_gaussian`,
`brute_force_knn`, and so on) and lets the
einsum read naturally as `weight @ coords`.

The names `cmass_coor`, `cmass_reference_displacement_grid`,
`cmass_reference_displacement_coor` and `diffuse` are retained as
aliases of [`center_of_mass_points`](nitrix-geometry-coords/center_of_mass_points.qmd),
[`displacement_from_reference_grid`](nitrix-geometry-coords/displacement_from_reference_grid.qmd),
[`displacement_from_reference_points`](nitrix-geometry-coords/displacement_from_reference_points.qmd) and
[`compactness_penalty`](nitrix-geometry-coords/compactness_penalty.qmd) respectively.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n_regions` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_points` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-geometry-coords-symbols}
:::
